steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content:
• A: $x^4+23{x}^{2}-14$ — constant term is wrong (should be $121-25=96$, not $-14$).
  • B: $x^4+23{x}^{2}+96$ — matches the expansion exactly.
  • C: $x^4+12{x}^{2}+121$ — $x^2$ coefficient wrong (forgot the $+x^2$ from the difference of squares) and constant wrong (forgot the $-25$).
  • D: $x^4+{x}^{2}+146$ — coefficients are inconsistent with $(x^2+11)^2+(x^2-25)$.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
